+-- Main module
+local M = {}
+
+function M.hello()
+    return "Hello from NeoJJ test"
+end
+
+return M
diff --git a/src/utils.lua b/src/utils.lua
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..175da78b7f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/utils.lua
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+-- Utility functions
+local U = {}
+
+function U.format(str)
+    return string.upper(str)
+end
+
+return U

+local main = require('src.main')
+
+assert(main.hello() == "Hello from NeoJJ test")
